channel.title: FinCalc India Blog
channel.description: Expert guides on EMI, SIP, Tax, GST and smart money management for every Indian

item.title: Iran War Ka India Pe Pura Impact 2026 — Oil ₹108, Petrol, Rupee, LPG Guide
item.description: Iran-USA war 2026 ka India pe complete impact — crude oil, petrol, rupee, LPG, EMI sab data ke saath.

item.title: Gold vs Mutual Fund India 2026 — 20 Saal ka Data, Tax, NRI Guide
item.description: Gold 11.2% CAGR vs Nifty 50 14.8% — real return comparison, tax rules, NRI guide, expert verdict.

item.title: CIBIL Score Guide 2026 — What It Is, How to Check & Improve Your Credit Score
item.description: Complete CIBIL score guide covering score ranges, interest rate impact, 7 improvement strategies, 6 myths busted, and free check methods for Indian borrowers.

item.title: ₹50 Lakh Home Loan EMI — SBI, HDFC, ICICI Comparison 2026
item.description: Complete EMI comparison with bank rates, prepayment savings, eligibility rules and tips for getting the lowest home loan rate in India.

item.title: GST Calculation Guide — Slabs, ITC, HSN Codes and Filing
item.description: Everything about GST rates, input tax credit, HSN/SAC codes, return filing dates and calculation methods explained.

item.title: SIP vs FD in 2026 — Where Should You Invest?
item.description: Returns comparison, risk analysis, tax treatment and smart allocation strategy for Indian investors.

item.title: Income Tax Guide 2026-27 — New vs Old Regime Complete Comparison
item.description: Complete comparison with slabs, deductions, charts and which regime saves you more tax.
